title: Advanced Minecraft
description: Everything you need for a pleasant game on private servers
body:
# Introducing "Advanced Minecraft" 🎮

If you're a Minecraft enthusiast looking to take your gameplay to the next level, look no further than **Advanced Minecraft** - a modpack that brings an exciting array of modifications to your Minecraft experience!

With this modpack, you'll get access to numerous mods, including:

*   **ChestTracker**
*   **Cosmetica**
*   **Status Effect Timer**
*   **3D Skin Layers**
*   ...and much more!

## Modpack Features 🧰

Advanced Minecraft is designed to enhance your gaming experience by adding new features and functions to the game. You can customize your Minecraft game to fit your preferences with mods like **Cosmetica** and **3D Skin Layers**. With mods like **MidnightControls** and **BetterF3**, you'll also have greater control over the game's interface.

## Visual Enhancements 🖼️

But that's not all - the modpack also includes a range of visual enhancements, such as **Iris Shaders**, **FabricSkyboxes**, and **Enhanced Block Entities**. These stunning visual effects bring your Minecraft world to life, and allow you to explore the game in a whole new light.


## Improved Performance 🚀

In addition, Advanced Minecraft includes mods that optimize your game's performance, such as **Sodium Extra**, **Lithium**, and **Dynamic FPS**. These mods reduce lag and improve overall game performance, ensuring a smoother and more enjoyable gameplay experience.

## Take Your Gameplay to the Next Level! 💪🏻

If you're someone who's always looking for ways to improve and enhance your Minecraft experience, then Advanced Minecraft is the modpack for you. Download it now and get ready to take your Minecraft gameplay to the next level! 🚀
